design.md — ICIT Design System Developer Reference
Portal button CSS classes (btn-primary-1, btn-ghost-1, btn-submit, btn-danger, btn-danger-1)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Webflow .w-button class forces bright-blue at equal specificity; !important CSS injection block in icit-app.js overrides to design system palette

nodes.label: CSS !important injection block pattern (top of icit-app.js)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Webflow .w-button has equal specificity to design system classes; !important injected via <style> tag at runtime ensures design system colors win

Wized configurator chrome-extension URL redirect blocking bug
nodes.contributor: rationale: Auth-guarded pages loaded in Wized configurator trigger chrome-extension URL redirect that blocks all GUI interaction; 244 steps attempted; led directly to the decision to replace Wized with icit-app.js

nodes.contributor: rationale: Must be done before deployment; 17 attribute additions + 1 new textarea element + 3 inline display:none styles + auth-flash wrappers

nodes.label: icit-app.js IIFE four-section structure (Core, API, UI, Pages+Dispatcher)
initLogin() — tab toggle, signIn, signUp page module
initDashboard() — application card, notifications drawer, withdraw, payment polling
initApply() — section stepper, draft save, CV upload, program questions, submit
initStatus() — timeline steps, event history, more-info, withdraw
initEnrollment() — guard, render, Stripe checkout trigger
Path-based dispatcher (window.location.pathname routing)
STATUS_MESSAGES map (status → next-action message + href)
STATUS_TIMELINE map + TIMELINE_STEPS array
Payment success polling pattern (dashboard ?payment=success, 3s interval, 30s timeout)
DOM loop / cloneRow() pattern (template hidden inline display:none, clone.style.display='')
nodes.contributor: rationale: Template row display:none must be set as inline style (not class) so cloneRow's clone.style.display='' removes it and lets Webflow stylesheet value apply

nodes.label: Wized Replacement Design Spec (2026-04-27)
Why Wized was abandoned (chrome-extension redirect bug, 244 steps failed, unversioned third-party dep)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Loading any auth-guarded page in Wized configurator triggers chrome-extension URL redirect preventing all GUI interaction; vanilla JS with Supabase SDK is more maintainable and version-controlled

nodes.label: API section contract (returns null for valid empty states, throws on errors)
